---

## Overview

> Vision-language agent for autonomous laptop control.

**AI Laptop Control Agent** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with OpenCV.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Image Frames"| CV["Computer Vision<br/>OpenCV"];
    CV -->|"Feature Maps"| D;
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0800,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d1000,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0800,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d1000,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#451a00,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
AI-Laptop-Control-Agent/
  .env
  ANALYSIS_SUMMARY.md
  AUTONOMOUS_AI_BLUEPRINT.md
  DRAWING_WORKFLOW.md
  FIXES_APPLIED.md
  FUTURISTIC_GUI_GUIDE.md
  GUI_CUSTOMIZATION.md
  IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md
  __pycache__/
    action_planner.cpython-311.pyc
    action_verifier.cpython-311.pyc
    agent.cpython-311.pyc
    agent.cpython-38.pyc
  screenshots/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Python` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `216` |
| **Frameworks** | `OpenCV` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>numpy</code>  <code>requests</code>  <code>pynput</code>  <code>protobuf</code>  <code>Pillow</code>  <code>google-generativeai</code>  <code>schedule</code>  <code>python-dotenv</code>  <code>typing-extensions</code>  <code>pyautogui</code>  <code>PyQt5</code>  <code>pyobjc-core</code>  <code>opencv-python</code>  <code>pyobjc-framework-Cocoa</code>
</p>
